title: 73% 的 PR 是由 AI 生成的——Claude Code 的创建者与 Spotify 对话：2,900 名工程师每天部署 4,500 次，甚至在地铁上提交代码

titleEn: 73% of PRs are generated by AI—Claude Code's creator talks with Spotify: 2,900 engineers deploy 4,500 times a day, even submitting code on the subway
descriptionZh: 去年 9 月，Anthropic Claude Code 创始人 Boris Cherny 与 Spotify 工程副总裁 Niklas Gustavsson 讨论了人工智能编码工具的未来。
descriptionEn: In September last year, Anthropic Claude Code founder Boris Cherny discussed the future of AI coding tools with Spotify's VP of Engineering, Niklas Gustavsson.
